---
ID: US-OLV-070
Title: Search HR records globally
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-19
Milestone: Build HR workflows and harden QA

As a HR operator
I want global search across candidates, employees, and devices
So that I can jump to records without knowing their page

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Pressing / outside editable fields opens GlobalSearch.
- [ ] Search groups results by Candidates, Employees, and Devices.
- [ ] Selecting a result navigates to the owning page.
- [ ] Escape closes the search modal.

Notes: Implemented with GlobalSearch and GlobalSearchButton.
---
